---
title: Emacs
description: |
  Powerful text editing with &nbsp;[![](img/logo_emacs.png){width="1.6em"}](https://julialang.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Courses</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Getting started with &nbsp;![](img/logo_emacs.png){width="1.6em"}](top_intro.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[An intro course to Emacs]{.text-muted}

:::

:::

:::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Webinars</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[[5, 5, 5, 5], [5, -5, -5, -5]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Emacs as a programming IDE](wb_ide.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Modern, faster & better Emacs](wb_new_tools.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Understanding Emacs modes](wb_modes.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[AI pair coding in Emacs](wb_llms.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Full Python IDE in Emacs](wb_python.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
